case_number: civil litigation is also pending. Issue notices

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1653 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15400/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15401/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Rana Muhammad Siddique, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is, inter alia, contended that respondent No.5 SHO P.S Kazi Ahmed kept the petitioner in illegal confinement. Primarily, the dispute between respondent No.6 and petitioner relates to a property regarding which a civil litigation is also pending. Issue notices to respondents as well as A.A.G for 22.11.2016. Notices to private respondents be issued through all modes except publication. On the next date, respondent No.5 SHO P.S Kazi Ahmed and respondent No.6 are directed to appear in person. Respondent No.4 DSP will ensure the presence of respondents No.5 & 6 before this Court on the next date. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioner and official respondents should conduct themselves in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner if they are approached with such a request. Copy of this order be provided to learned A.A.G for strict compliance. JUDGE Ali Haider
